subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that through the grace of the True One, exalted be His glory, thou hast attained. In this day it behooveth everyone to turn unto the True One, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت حق جل جلاله فائز شدی امروز بر جمیع لازم که از حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
